arts.ttl: Exclusive: £16.6m star now decides to snub Manchester City, Tottenham and Liverpool in favour of new contract
Man City, Liverpool 'on red alert' as Martin Zubimendi 'makes major transfer decision'
arts.sum: Spain international Martin Zubimendi is reportedly open to leaving Real Sociedad next summer amid interest from Manchester City and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Liverpool, Arsenal v Manchester United, and more – Premier League clockwatch live
arts.sum: Manchester City face Nottingham Forest, Southampton take on Chelsea, Everton host Wolves and Aston Villa play Brentford. Follow it all live Pep G and Man City host Nottingham Forest There is pressure on the City manager. If his team don’t emerge victorious tonight then Pep will have gone eight games without a win. That’s eight fingers! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool youngster told he 'will play this month' despite featuring for U21s
arts.sum: One Liverpool youngster is set to be given his chance in the first team in December ahead of the busy Christmas period

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold out as Liverpool changes confirmed for Newcastle with Amara Nallo on bench
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his XI for the clash with Newcastle United in the Premier League at St James' Park

arts.ttl: Report: Bundesliga star 'agrees to join Liverpool' amid Trent Alexander-Arnold uncertainty
arts.sum: Liverpool are reported to have been in "regular contact" with Bayer Leverkusen right-back Jeremie Frimpong in recent weeks as the club consider life after Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Liverpool - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to continue dominant run plus updates from Southampton vs Chelsea, Man City vs Nottingham Forest and Everton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Newcastle host Liverpool in Premier League action, plus updates from the rest of Wednesday's 7:30pm kick-offs.

arts.ttl: Five players who could join Liverpool in January
arts.sum: Feyenoord star Anis Hadj-Moussa - who did not play under Slot but was presumably signed with his approval - has recently been mooted as a target for Liverpool after his standout performance against Man City in the Champions League earlier in the season. The right-back position is one Liverpool need to think long and hard about due to Trent Alexander-Arnold's contract situation.

arts.sum: Arne Slot's side travel to St James' Park as they look to stretch their lead at the top of the Premier League table
